error_signature: Unable to sign without access token
title: Twitter node unable to sign without access token
symptom: When attempting to connect the Twitter node, n8n returns 'Unable to sign without access token'. This prevents the user from successfully authenticating their account.
applies_when: Attempting to connect to an X account
not_this_if: Access token is already set and valid
root_cause: The error occurs because the Twitter node requires a valid access token to authenticate API requests. If the access token is missing or invalid, the node cannot sign the request, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Regenerate the access token and secret in your Twitter developer account.
Copy the new access token and secret into the Twitter node settings in n8n.
agent_instruction: Regenerate your Twitter access token and secret, then update them in the Twitter node settings.
